signals.headline: US and Iran Plan Fresh Talks Before April 7 Ceasefire Expires Next Week | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US and Iran Plan Fresh Talks Before April 7 Ceasefire Expires Next Week | NO | HIGH confidence**  
The US and Iran are discussing a second round of negotiations in Islamabad after weekend talks failed, aiming to hold them before the two-week ceasefire—announced April 7—expires early next week.[1]
